gtceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.name: %sAbsolute Parallel Hatch:
gtceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.descrip: §7Enables the use of absolute parallel hatches
§7Which runs the recipe X amount of times without any penalties
gtceu.modifier.bulk_processing.name: %sBulk Processing:
gtceu.modifier.bulk_processing.descripti: §7If the machine has enough inputs to run at least 16 parallels,
§7it will run only at 13x the duration
§7Will not bulk if it does not have enough inputs
gtceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.name: %sThroughput Boosting:
gtceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.descr: §7The machine can run by default with 4 parallels
§7The duration of the recipe is increased 1.6x and EU/t 0.95x
gtceu.modifier.fake_fusion_overclock.des: §7Unlike most machines Fusion Reactors can not overclock by increasing the energy hatches on them.
§7Instead the way to overclock Fusion Reactors is to use the next tier of reactor.
§7Each overclock is special as it only doubles the energy cost while halving the duration. §b[2:2]
§7Fusion Reflectors allow another way to tier up your Fusion Reactors.
§7Instead of relying on higher tier fusion reactors you can upgrade the Reflectors to speed up recipes.
§7Each tier up of a Fusion Reflector doubles the energy cost and halves the duration independent of other factors. §b[2:2]
§7This stacks with Fusion Overclock but keep in mind while power cost may increase it will not tier up recipes in a lower tier reactor.
§7No §dLuV §7to §cZPM §7tier up from increasing Reflectors in a §fMK1§7.
